skill.name: eightctl
skill.description: Control Eight Sleep pods (status, temperature, alarms, schedules).
skill.summary: Control Eight Sleep pods (status, temperature, alarms, schedules).
skill.author: aiskillstore

security_audit.summary: Official skill with simple instructions for the eightctl command-line tool. The skill references external commands, network API use, a local config file, and environment variables, but no malicious behavior or prompt injection was found.

content.user_title: Control Eight Sleep Pods from Your AI Assistant
content.value_statement: Managing an Eight Sleep pod from a terminal can interrupt bedtime routines. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code use eightctl for pod status, temperature, alarms, schedules, audio, and base controls.
actual_capabilities: Runs eightctl status checks for configured Eight Sleep pods.
Guides temperature changes with confirmation before changing pod settings.
Supports pod power actions through eightctl on and off commands.
Lists and manages alarms, schedules, audio state, and bed base settings.
Uses either the eightctl config file or supported environment variables for authentication.
limitations: Requires the eightctl binary to be installed before use.
Requires valid Eight Sleep credentials or an existing eightctl configuration.
Uses an unofficial API that may be rate-limited or change without notice.
Should not change temperature, alarms, or schedules without explicit user confirmation.

use_cases.title: Check Bed Status
use_cases.description: Review pod status, active temperature, and related device state before making any changes.

use_cases.title: Adjust Night Settings
use_cases.description: Set a preferred bed temperature or turn the pod on after confirming the exact action.

use_cases.title: Manage Schedules and Alarms
use_cases.description: List, create, or update alarms and schedules through guided eightctl commands.

prompt_templates.title: Check my pod status
prompt_templates.prompt: Use eightctl to check my Eight Sleep pod status and summarize the current state.

prompt_templates.title: Set a safe temperature
prompt_templates.prompt: Set my Eight Sleep pod temperature to 20 degrees with eightctl after confirming the exact change with me.

prompt_templates.title: Review alarms
prompt_templates.prompt: Use eightctl to list my Eight Sleep alarms, then explain which alarms are active and which need attention.

prompt_templates.title: Audit my sleep setup
prompt_templates.prompt: Use eightctl to review pod status, schedules, alarms, audio state, and base information. Recommend only changes that I approve first.

output_examples.input: Check my Eight Sleep pod before bed.
output_examples.output: Your pod is reachable and currently enabled. I will report the current temperature and ask before changing any settings.
I can lower the pod temperature with eightctl. Please confirm the target temperature before I send the command.
I will list the configured alarms and summarize active, disabled, and next scheduled alarm entries.

best_practices: Confirm every temperature, alarm, schedule, audio, or base change before running the command.
Use an existing config file when possible to avoid repeated logins.
Limit repeated status requests because the underlying API is unofficial and rate-limited.
anti_patterns: Do not store Eight Sleep credentials in chat transcripts or shared files.
Do not run repeated login commands during troubleshooting.
Do not change alarms, schedules, or base angles without clear user approval.

faq.question: What does this skill control?
faq.answer: It helps use eightctl to control Eight Sleep pod status, power, temperature, alarms, schedules, audio, and base settings.

faq.question: Does this skill install eightctl?
faq.answer: The metadata identifies the required eightctl binary and a Go installation source, but the binary must be available before use.

faq.question: How does authentication work?
faq.answer: eightctl can use a local config file or the EIGHTCTL_EMAIL and EIGHTCTL_PASSWORD environment variables.

faq.question: Can it change my bed temperature automatically?
faq.answer: It can help run temperature commands, but it should ask for confirmation before changing the pod temperature.

faq.question: Is the Eight Sleep API official?
faq.answer: The skill notes that the API is unofficial and rate-limited, so repeated logins and frequent polling should be avoided.

faq.question: Which AI tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report marks it as compatible with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
